claim: VIOLATION: If applyP2 were moved inside the loop (a natural refactoring),
smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 41
; VIOLATION: If applyP2 were moved inside the loop (a natural refactoring),
; it would be called N times with the full contracts array, producing N×M
; duplicate AxiomCheck entries instead of M.
; The comment "P2 needs pairs" explains WHY it's outside, but nothing in the
; type system or runtime prevents this refactoring mistake.
; Code transition: applyP2(contracts) called once → M checks added
; Hypothetical refactoring: called once per contract iteration → N×M checks added
(declare-const N Int)                   ; contracts.length
(declare-const M Int)                   ; |applyP2(contracts)| — unique P2 checks
(declare-const checks_if_outside Int)   ; current design: called once
(declare-const checks_if_inside Int)    ; refactored design: called N times
; Current code transition: applyP2 called once, appends M checks
(assert (> N 1))
(assert (> M 0))
(assert (= checks_if_outside M))
; Refactored transition: applyP2(contracts) called N times in loop body
(assert (= checks_if_inside (* N M)))
; Violation: refactored version produces more checks than intended
(assert (> checks_if_inside checks_if_outside))
(check-sat)
